records.ety: [L. cumulatus, p. p. of cumulare to heap up, fr. cumulus a heap. See Cumber.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Cumulated (-l?`t?d); p. pr. & vb. n. Cumulating (-l?`t?ng).]

defs: To gather or throw into a heap; to heap together; to accumulate.
quotes: Shoals of shells, bedded and cumulated heap upon heap.
